name: PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa, Tbk
summary: PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa, Tbk operates as a food and beverage industry in Indonesia. It imports and sells syrups, fruit mixes, frappe products, and gourmet sauces; coffee products; almond milk, soy milk, coconut milk, dairy milk, and free lactose milk products; and coffee makers. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tangerang Selatan, Indonesia.
